experiment_title: 钾的燃烧与与水反应实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="钾的燃烧与与水反应实验" goal="观察钾在空气中燃烧及与水反应的现象，理解钾的化学性质。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="250ml" />
      <Component id="crucible_1" type="crucible" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="alcohol_lamp_1" type="alcohol_lamp" />
      <Component id="crucible_tongs_1" type="crucible_tongs" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="filter_paper_1" type="filter_paper" />
      <Component id="stirring_rod_1" type="stirring_rod" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="Potassium" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Kerosene" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Phenolphthalein_Solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Distilled_Water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Tap_Water" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      <Add vessel="filter_paper_1" reagent="K" mass="0.1 g" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="filter_paper_1" reagent="C12H26" volume="2 mL" id="step_1" />
      <Attach vessel="crucible_1" support="crucible_tongs_1" id="step_2" />
      <Transfer from_vessel="filter_paper_1" to_vessel="crucible_1" volume="0.1 g" id="step_3" />
      <Insert tool="alcohol_lamp_1" vessel="crucible_1" id="step_4" />
      <Heat vessel="crucible_1" id="step_5" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="H2O" volume="50 mL" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="C20H14O4" volume="2 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_8" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="K" mass="0.1 g" id="step_9" />
      <Stir vessel="beaker_1" id="step_10" />
      <Wait time="10s" id="step_11" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 称取钾并用滤纸包裹，加入煤油保护钾，准备转移。
用坩埚钳夹持坩埚，将包裹好的钾转移至坩埚中，准备加热。
用酒精灯加热坩埚中的钾，观察钾在空气中燃烧的现象。
在烧杯中加入水和酚酞溶液，准备钾与水的反应。
将钾加入烧杯，搅拌并观察钾与水反应及酚酞变色现象。
